description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push. Use multiple jobs with different configurations: AppleClang on MacOS 10.15 and 11 for C++17 and C++20, GCC 9, 10, 11 on ubuntu-20.04 for C++17 and C++20, and Clang 9-13 on ubuntu-20.04 for C++17 and C++20 with libc++ and libstdc++. For each job, check out the code, verify the C++ compiler, and run make with specific flags.
